Line 81:   Write(Html.Telerik().Grid(Model).Name("QuestionnaireDetailViewGrid")
Line 82:   .ToolBar(commands =>
Line 83:   {
Line 84:       commands.Template("<form method='post' enctype='multipart/form-data' action='/Questionnaire/UploadAutoMailExcelData/" + this.ViewContext.RouteData.Values["id"] + "'><a class='t-button' href='/Questionnaire/ExportExcelQuestionnaireDetail/" + this.ViewContext.RouteData.Values["id"] + "' id='export'>Export to Excel</a><input style='display: none' type='file' id='file' name='file' accept='.csv, application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet, application/vnd.ms-excel' /><a class='t-button' id='btn-upload' href='#'>Upload</a><input type='submit' value='Process File'></input></form>");
Line 85:   })
Line 86:   .Columns(columns =>
Line 87:           {
Line 88:               columns.Bound(o => o.Subject).Title("Subject").Width(100);
Line 89:               columns.Bound(o => o.TextAutoMail).Title("Text AutoMail").Width(100);
Line 90:               columns.Bound(o => o.MailType).Title("Mail Type").Width(100);
Line 91:           })
Line 92:           .DataKeys(keys => keys.Add(o => o.Id))
Line 93:           .Pageable(pager => pager.PageSize(13).Total(200).Enabled(true))
Line 94:           .Sortable(sorting => sorting.Enabled(true))
Line 95:   
Line 96:           .Scrollable(scrolling => scrolling
Line 97:              .Enabled(true)
Line 98:              .Height(380))
Line 99:              .HtmlAttributes(new { @class = "ra" })
Line 100:  );

Line 146:  <style>
Line 147:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu {
Line 148:          display: block !important;
Line 149:      }
Line 150:  
Line 151:      .display_menu {
Line 152:          left: 65px;
Line 153:          overflow: visible;
Line 154:          position: absolute;
Line 155:          top: -5px;
Line 156:          background: #fff;
Line 157:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 158:          z-index: 100;
Line 159:      }
Line 160:  
Line 161:      .t-grid-content tr > td {
Line 162:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 163:          position: relative;
Line 164:      }
Line 165:  
Line 166:      .display_menu > ul {
Line 167:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 168:      }
Line 169:  
Line 170:      .display_menu li {
Line 171:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 172:          width: 143px;
Line 173:      }
Line 174:  </style>

Line 202:

Line 207:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireAutoMail.cshtml", 2675, 1173, true);
Line 208:  
Line 209:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 210:      $(function () {
Line 211:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 212:          $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 213:              autoOpen: false
Line 214:          });
Line 215:          $('#popup').bind('dialogclose', function (event) {
Line 216:              window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 217:          });
Line 218:      });
Line 219:  
Line 220:      function CloseMe() {
Line 221:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('close');
Line 222:          window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 223:      }
Line 224:      function OpenEmailDialog(ac) {
Line 225:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 226:  
Line 227:          $.get(""/WrongContact/Index"", { accessCode: ac }, function (data) {
Line 228:  
Line 229:              $(""#EmailDialog"").html(data);
Line 230:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 231:                  width: 1200,
Line 232:                  height: 1000,
Line 233:              });
Line 234:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 235:          });
Line 236:      }
Line 237:      $('#menu_block').hover(function () {
Line 238:          // alert(""call"");
Line 239:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 240:      }, function () {
Line 241:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 242:      })
Line 243:  
Line 244:      $('#menu_block').mouseenter(function () {
Line 245:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 246:      }).mouseleave(function () {
Line 247:  
Line 248:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 249:  
Line 250:      });
Line 251:  
Line 252:      function openEditPopup(id) {
Line 253:          $.get(""");
Line 254:  
Line 255:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireAutoMail.cshtml", 2675, 1173, true);

Line 269:  
Line 270:  WriteLiteral(@""" + id, function (data) {
Line 271:              $(""#genericPopup"").html(data);
Line 272:          });
Line 273:  
Line 274:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog({ height: 600, title: ""Edit/Correct"" });
Line 275:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('open');
Line 276:      }
Line 277:  
Line 278:      function openRemovePopup(id, name) {
Line 279:          alertify.set({
Line 280:              labels: {
Line 281:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 282:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 283:              },
Line 284:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 285:          });
Line 286:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 287:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Remove : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 288:              if (e) {
Line 289:                  // Click no
Line 290:              } else {
Line 291:                  // click yes
Line 292:  
Line 293:                  $.get(""");
Line 294:  
Line 295:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireAutoMail.cshtml", 3902, 726, true);
